metadata.title: Gaming Headset Release Tracker
metadata.description: Gaming headset release tracker with expanded back-catalog and current-selling product coverage, using official pages plus Amazon first-seen dates when official release dates are unavailable.
metadata.normalization: Family-level model normalization; platform/color variants collapsed unless the model family is materially different.
metadata.currentOfficialSweepMethod: Brand-by-brand sweep of current official headset listing pages; missing release dates left null pending official/Amazon first-seen backfill.
caveats: Current official lineup sweep added currentListing data brand-by-brand. Newly added products without verified launch dates keep releaseDate null until date backfill.

imageCoverage.strategy: Local generated SVG placeholder per headset for complete image coverage; records are ready for later official image backfill.
